message:
fix: doctor detects expired vault tokens + ActiveProfile prefers named profiles

Two fixes for issue #14:

1. doctor: checkAuthFiles() now inspects vault profile token expiry
   using buildProfileHealth(). Reports expired tokens as 'fail' and
   tokens expiring within 15min as 'warn'. System profiles (_backup_*,
   _original) are skipped.

2. authfile: ActiveProfile() now prefers user-named profiles over
   system profiles when multiple profiles share the same identity hash.
   Previously, _backup_* profiles sorted first alphabetically and
   shadowed the active named profile.

Note: The root cause of refresh_token_reused drift (OpenAI's single-use
refresh token rotation conflicting with multi-copy storage) is an
architectural issue requiring deeper token synchronization work.

Closes #14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
